SeqToSet(b)\n  && SeqToSet(a) + SeqToSet(b) == set i | 1 <= i <= n :: i\n}\n\nghost predicate Player1CanWin(S1: set<int>, S2: set<int>, steps: nat)\n  decreases steps\n{\n  if S2 == {} then true\n  else if S1 == {} || steps == 0 then false\n  else exists c1 | c1 in S1 :: forall c2 | c2 in S2 ::\n    if c1 > c2 then Player1CanWin(S1 + {c2}, S2 - {c2}, steps - 1)\n    else Player1CanWin(S1 - {c1}, S2 + {c1}, steps - 1)\n}\n\nghost predicate Player1WinsGame(S1: set<int>, S2: set<int>, bound: nat)\n{\n  exists steps: nat :: Player1CanWin(S1, S2, steps)\n}\n\n// ── Helper lemmas ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nlemma SeqToSetMembership(s: seq<int>, x: int)\n  ensures x in SeqToSet(s) <==> exists k | 0 <= k < |s| :: s[k] == x\n  decreases |s|\n{\n  if |s| == 0 {\n  } else {\n    SeqToSetMembership(s[..|s|-1], x);\n    forall k | 0 <= k < |s| - 1\n      ensures s[..|s|-1][k] == s[k]\n    {}\n  }\n}\n\n// If Player 1 has a card m that beats every card in S2, Player 1 wins in |S2| steps.\nlemma Player1WinsWithMax(S1: set<int>, S2: set<int>, m: int)\n  requires m in S1\n  requires forall x | x in S2 :: x < m\n  decreases |S2|\n  ensures Player1CanWin(S1, S2, |S2|)\n{\n  if S2 == {} {\n  } else {\n    forall c2 | c2 in S2\n      ensures Player1CanWin(S1 + {c2}, S2 - {c2}, |S2| - 1)\n    {\n      assert |S2 - {c2}| == |S2| - 1;\n      Player1WinsWithMax(S1 + {c2}, S2 - {c2}, m);\n    }\n    assert m in S1;\n    assert forall c2 | c2 in S2 :: m > c2;\n    assert forall c2 | c2 in S2 ::\n      (if m > c2 then Player1CanWin(S1 + {c2}, S2 - {c2}, |S2| - 1)\n       else Player1CanWin(S1 - {m}, S2 + {m}, |S2| - 1));\n  }\n}\n\n// If Player 2 has a card m that beats every card in S1, Player 1 cannot win.\nlemma Player1LosesWithoutMax(S1: set<int>, S2: set<int>, m: int, steps: nat)\n  requires m in S2\n  requires forall x | x in S1 :: x < m\n  decreases steps\n  ensures !Player1CanWin(S1, S2, steps)\n{\n  if S1 == {} || steps == 0 {\n  } else {\n    // Proof by contradiction\n    if Player1CanWin(S1, S2, steps) {\n      assert S2 != {};\n      var c1 :| c1 in S1 && (forall c2 | c2 in S2 ::\n        if c1 > c2 then Player1CanWin(S1 + {c2}, S2 - {c2}, steps - 1)\n        else Player1CanWin(S1 - {c1}, S2 + {c1}, steps - 1));\n      assert c1 < m;\n      // Instantiate universal with c2 = m: since c1 < m, else branch taken\n      assert Player1CanWin(S1 - {c1}, S2 + {c1}, steps - 1);\n      // But by induction hypothesis this is false\n      Player1LosesWithoutMax(S1 - {c1}, S2 + {c1}, m, steps - 1);\n      assert false;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// ── Method ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nmethod CardGame(n: int, k1: int, k2: int, a: seq<int>, b: seq<int>) returns (firstPlayerWins: bool)\n  requires ValidDeck(n, a, b)\n  requires k1 == |a| && k2 == |b|\n  ensures firstPlayerWins <==> Player1WinsGame(SeqToSet(a), SeqToSet(b), n)\n{\n  var maxA := a[0];\n  var i := 1;\n  while i < |a|\n    invariant 1 <= i <= |a|\n    invariant forall k | 0 <= k < i :: a[k] <= maxA\n    invariant exists k | 0 <= k < i :: a[k] == maxA\n  {\n    if a[i] > maxA {\n      maxA := a[i];\n    }\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n\n  var maxB := b[0];\n  var j := 1;\n  while j < |b|\n    invariant 1 <= j <= |b|\n    invariant forall k | 0 <= k < j :: b[k] <= maxB\n    invariant exists k | 0 <= k < j :: b[k] == maxB\n  {\n    if b[j] > maxB {\n      maxB := b[j];\n    }\n    j := j + 1;\n  }\n\n  firstPlayerWins := maxA > maxB;\n\n  // Prove maxA is in SeqToSet(a) and is its maximum\n  ghost var ka :| 0 <= ka < |a| && a[ka] == maxA;\n  SeqToSetMembership(a, maxA);\n  assert maxA in SeqToSet(a);\n\n  ghost var kb :| 0 <= kb < |b| && b[kb] == maxB;\n  SeqToSetMembership(b, maxB);\n  assert maxB in SeqToSet(b);\n\n  forall x | x in SeqToSet(a)\n    ensures x <= maxA\n  {\n    SeqToSetMembership(a, x);\n    var kx :| 0 <= kx < |a| && a[kx] == x;\n  }\n\n  forall x | x in SeqToSet(b)\n    ensures x <= maxB\n  {\n    SeqToSetMembership(b, x);\n    var kx :| 0 <= kx < |b| && b[kx] == x;\n  }\n\n  // maxA != maxB because they're in disjoint sets\n  assert maxA != maxB;\n\n  if maxA > maxB {\n    assert forall x | x in SeqToSet(b) :: x < maxA;\n    Player1WinsWithMax(SeqToSet(a), SeqToSet(b), maxA);\n    assert Player1CanWin(SeqToSet(a), SeqToSet(b), |SeqToSet(b)|);\n  } else {\n    assert maxB > maxA;\n    assert forall x | x in SeqToSet(a) :: x < maxB;\n    forall steps: nat\n      ensures !Player1CanWin(SeqToSet(a), SeqToSet(b), steps)\n    {\n }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":10673,"cache_read_input_tokens":8610,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":10673},"output_tokens":13,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"21a1c707-25a0-4848-89b6-51aae0675276","uuid":"1f8716e3-94e0-412a-8451-4a1c2e99d21f"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FoXtJ3uPV3RPUBUEYvjQtY","type":"tool_result","content":"File S2 + {c1}, steps - 1)\n}\n\nghost predicate Player1WinsGame(S1: set<int>, S2: set<int>, bound: nat)\n{\n  exists steps: nat :: Player1CanWin(S1, S2, steps)\n}\n\n// ── Helper lemmas ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nlemma SeqToSetMembership(s: seq<int>, x: int)\n  ensures x in SeqToSet(s) <==> exists k | 0 <= k < |s| :: s[k] == x\n  decreases |s|\n{\n  if |s| == 0 {\n  } else {\n    SeqToSetMembership(s[..|s|-1], x);\n    forall k | 0 <= k < |s| - 1\n      ensures s[..|s|-1][k] == s[k]\n    {}\n  }\n}\n\n// If Player 1 has a card m that beats every card in S2, Player 1 wins in |S2| steps.\nlemma Player1WinsWithMax(S1: set<int>, S2: set<int>, m: int)\n  requires m in S1\n  requires forall x | x in S2 :: x < m\n  decreases |S2|\n  ensures Player1CanWin(S1, S2, |S2|)\n{\n  if S2 == {} {\n  } else {\n    forall c2 | c2 in S2\n      ensures Player1CanWin(S1 + {c2}, S2 - {c2}, |S2| - 1)\n    {\n      assert |S2 - {c2}| == |S2| - 1;\n      Player1WinsWithMax(S1 + {c2}, S2 - {c2}, m);\n    }\n    assert m in S1;\n    assert forall c2 | c2 in S2 :: m > c2;\n    assert forall c2 | c2 in S2 ::\n      (if m > c2 then Player1CanWin(S1 + {c2}, S2 - {c2}, |S2| - 1)\n       else Player1CanWin(S1 - {m}, S2 + {m}, |S2| - 1));\n  }\n}\n\n// If Player 2 has a card m that beats every card in S1, Player 1 cannot win.\nlemma Player1LosesWithoutMax(S1: set<int>, S2: set<int>, m: int, steps: nat)\n  requires m in S2\n  requires forall x | x in S1 :: x < m\n  decreases steps\n  ensures !Player1CanWin(S1, S2, steps)\n{\n  if S1 == {} || steps == 0 {\n  } else {\n    // Proof by contradiction\n    if Player1CanWin(S1, S2, steps) {\n      assert S2 != {};\n      var c1 :| c1 in S1 && (forall c2 | c2 in S2 ::\n        if c1 > c2 then Player1CanWin(S1 + {c2}, S2 - {c2}, steps - 1)\n        else Player1CanWin(S1 - {c1}, S2 + {c1}, steps - 1));\n      assert c1 < m;\n      // Instantiate universal with c2 = m: since c1 < m, else branch taken\n      assert Player1CanWin(S1 - {c1}, S2 + {c1}, steps - 1);\n      // But by induction hypothesis this is false\n      Player1LosesWithoutMax(S1 - {c1}, S2 + {c1}, m, steps - 1);\n      assert false;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// ── Method ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nmethod CardGame(n: int, k1: int, k2: int, a: seq<int>, b: seq<int>) returns (firstPlayerWins: bool)\n  requires ValidDeck(n, a, b)\n  requires k1 == |a| && k2 == |b|\n  ensures firstPlayerWins <==> Player1WinsGame(SeqToSet(a), SeqToSet(b), n)\n{\n  var maxA := a[0];\n  var i := 1;\n  while i < |a|\n    invariant 1 <= i <= |a|\n    invariant forall k | 0 <= k < i :: a[k] <= maxA\n    invariant exists k | 0 <= k < i :: a[k] == maxA\n  {\n    if a[i] > maxA {\n      maxA := a[i];\n    }\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n\n  var maxB := b[0];\n  var j := 1;\n  while j < |b|\n    invariant 1 <= j <= |b|\n    invariant forall k | 0 <= k < j :: b[k] <= maxB\n    invariant exists k | 0 <= k < j :: b[k] == maxB\n  {\n    if b[j] > maxB {\n      maxB := b[j];\n    }\n    j := j + 1;\n  }\n\n  firstPlayerWins := maxA > maxB;\n\n  // Prove maxA is in SeqToSet(a) and is its maximum\n  ghost var ka :| 0 <= ka < |a| && a[ka] == maxA;\n  SeqToSetMembership(a, maxA);\n  assert maxA in SeqToSet(a);\n\n  ghost var kb :| 0 <= kb < |b| && b[kb] == maxB;\n  SeqToSetMembership(b, maxB);\n  assert maxB in SeqToSet(b);\n\n  forall x | x in SeqToSet(a)\n    ensures x <= maxA\n  {\n    SeqToSetMembership(a, x);\n    var kx :| 0 <= kx < |a| && a[kx] == x;\n  }\n\n  forall x | x in SeqToSet(b)\n    ensures x <= maxB\n  {\n    SeqToSetMembership(b, x);\n    var kx :| 0 <= kx < |b| && b[kx] == x;\n  }\n\n  // maxA != maxB because they're in disjoint sets\n  assert maxA != maxB;\n\n  if maxA > maxB {\n    assert forall x | x in SeqToSet(b) :: x < maxA;\n    Player1WinsWithMax(SeqToSet(a), SeqToSet(b), maxA);\n    assert Player1CanWin(SeqToSet(a), SeqToSet(b), |SeqToSet(b)|);\n  } else {\n    assert maxB > maxA;\n    assert forall x | x in SeqToSet(a) :: x < maxB;\n    forall steps: nat\n      ensures !Player1CanWin(SeqToSet(a), SeqToSet(b), steps)\n    {\n      Player1LosesWithoutMax(SeqToSet(a), SeqToSet(b), maxB, steps);\n    }\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}},{"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"allowed","resetsAt":1773788400,"rateLimitType":"five_hour","overageStatus":"rejected","overageDisabledReason":"org_level_disabled","isUsingOverage":false},"uuid":"89c2e3de-cad9-4d34-8cd5-18caf29107dc","session_id":"21a1c707-25a0-4848-89b6-51aae0675276"},{"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"rejected","resetsAt":1773788400,"rateLimitType":"five_hour","overageStatus":"rejected","overageDisabledReason":"org_level_disabled","isUsingOverage":false},"uuid":"786c8aae-4d6c-4166-9790-db855fe3a318","session_id":"21a1c707-25a0-4848-89b6-51aae0675276"},{"type":"assistant","message":{"id":"2612cc34-f686-4590-904a-577faa9c92ae","container":null,"model":"<synthetic>","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"stop_sequence","stop_sequence":"","type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0,"cache_creation_input_tokens":0,"cache_read_input_tokens":0,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":null,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":null,"iterations":null,"speed":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"You've
